promotion_policy: Promote SOURCE_KEEP, TEST_KEEP, POLICY_MEMORY_KEEP, and selected DOC_REPORT_KEEP into a clean origin/main worktree; never promote generated audio, release_gate outputs, build outputs, caches, imported content noise, signed URLs, secrets, or stale lockfile drift.
